reviews.review_description: Super fun way to play in your room with friends!

This is a fun Arcade meets sports game. In mixed reality I can have my character jump onto my sofa and other furniture to get extra height to perform trick shots or gather power ups . Also shooting with my water balloon gun and punching with my giant boxing glove thingy is cool. I use it to gather tons of coins with my arms .
Scoring against the bots is fun but it’s even more fun to get some friends with their Quests on and go multiplayer ! Playing with them on teams or against them is crazy fun!  Practice against the bots and then bring your friends by for a Fireball party !

Really fun and unique mixed reality experience! I've been fascinated by MR game design, but most of them are arenas or levels that sit in your space with your room as an unrelated background. Mega Fireball uses your room AS the arena. Bounce fireballs off your TV, characters jump-flip off your couch, etc. It real feels like it is happening in your space. The game itself is pretty wacky and chaotic arcade-style fun. Like a surreal sport with Mario style movement and power ups.
